currentStatus.summary: Phase 1 remains stable, and Phase 2 backend Steps 1–7 are complete (scope/engine/filter routing, internal scene generation, above_me alignment, and cross-engine object resolution).
currentStatus.note: Step 8 endpoint exposure and frontend Phase 2 controls are not complete yet.

currentFocus: Implementing Phase 2 Step 8 controlled endpoint exposure (scope -> engine -> filter) without breaking the existing pipeline
Keeping Phase 1 runtime behavior and mounted command-center shell stable while backend expansion continues
Keeping public/internal status records synchronized with verified Step 1–7 backend reality

recentProgress.title: Phase 2 Step 1 completed (spec lock)
recentProgress.summary: Scopes, engines, filters, and anti-drift rules are now explicit and locked in the Phase 2 specification.

recentProgress.title: Phase 2 Steps 2-4 completed (routing layer)
recentProgress.summary: Backend now enforces scope routing, engine routing, and filter validation through '/api/scopes' with stable JSON 400 failures for invalid combinations.

recentProgress.title: Phase 2 Steps 5-6 completed (internal scene pipeline)
recentProgress.summary: Required engines generate structured internal scenes with grouped reasoning, and 'above_me' is aligned into the same Phase 2 pipeline while '/api/scene/above-me' remains stable.

recentProgress.title: Phase 2 Step 7 completed (object resolution integrity)
recentProgress.summary: Cross-engine objects now resolve through '/api/object/{id}' for required engines while scene objects remain summary-level and do not duplicate detail payload fields.

recentProgress.title: Backend test suite passing
recentProgress.summary: Backend tests are currently passing in project runtime ('.venv/bin/python -m pytest backend/tests -q').

inProgress.title: Phase 2 Step 8 preparation
inProgress.summary: Preparing controlled endpoint exposure work while preserving the scope -> engine -> filter pipeline and Phase 1 runtime stability.

comingNext.title: Phase 2 Step 8 endpoint exposure
comingNext.summary: Expose controlled backend endpoints for scope/engine/filter-driven scene retrieval without introducing frontend-owned logic.

comingNext.title: Phase 2 frontend controls after backend exposure
comingNext.summary: Begin Step 9+ frontend scope/engine/filter controls only after Step 8 backend exposure is complete.

roadmap.title: Command Center
roadmap.summary: Build the Above Me experience with clear scene, object interaction, and detail views.

roadmap.title: Engine Exploration
roadmap.summary: Expand into Earth, Sun, Satellite, Solar System, and Deep Sky exploration.

roadmap.title: Visual System
roadmap.summary: Add immersive spatial exploration with maps, globes, and 3D views.

roadmap.title: Knowledge System
roadmap.summary: Connect objects, research, missions, media, and events into a discovery layer.

roadmap.title: Prediction System
roadmap.summary: Add forecasting, alerts, timelines, and personalized recommendations.
